'''mathata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:focusser|focusser]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-th-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:focusser|focusser]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mathata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæthætæth|mæthætæth]] || [[word:mæthætæj|mæthætæj]] || [[word:mæthætæsh|mæthætæsh]] || [[word:mæthætæ|mæthætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mathathatath|mathathatath]] || [[word:mathathataj|mathathataj]] || [[word:mathathatash|mathathatash]] || [[word:mathathata|mathathata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mathatath|mathatath]] || [[word:mathataj|mathataj]] || [[word:mathatash|mathatash]] || [[word:mathata|mathata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mathaftath|mathaftath]] || [[word:mathaftaj|mathaftaj]] || [[word:mathaftash|mathaftash]] || [[word:mathaftaf|mathaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mathatatha|mathatatha]] || [[word:mathataja|mathataja]] || [[word:mathatasha|mathatasha]] || [[word:mathataka|mathataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mathatath|mathatath]] || [[word:mathataj|mathataj]] || [[word:mathatash|mathatash]] || [[word:mathata|mathata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mathatathal|mathatathal]] || [[word:mathatajal|mathatajal]] || [[word:mathatashal|mathatashal]] || [[word:mathatakal|mathatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mathatathatha|mathatathatha]] || [[word:mathatajaja|mathatajaja]] || [[word:mathatashasha|mathatashasha]] || [[word:mathataka|mathataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mathatathan|mathatathan]] || [[word:mathatajan|mathatajan]] || [[word:mathatashan|mathatashan]] || [[word:mathatakan|mathatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mathatathaoro|mathatathaoro]] || [[word:mathatajaoro|mathatajaoro]] || [[word:mathatashaoro|mathatashaoro]] || [[word:mathatakaoro|mathatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
